title: Yiddow #3035
definition:
Iddo = "timely" or "lovely"

 1) son of Zechariah, ruler of the tribe of Manasseh east of the
    Jordan in the time of David
 2) a man who took a foreign wife in the time of Ezra
nasbUsage:
